  "findings": [
    "Personnel are positioned within the swing radius of active heavy equipment, creating an immediate struck-by and crushing hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all equipment operations in the affected area (Stop Work Authority).",
    "Evacuate all unauthorized personnel from the swing radius.",
    "Erect physical barricades or warning lines to isolate the swing radius hazard zone.",
    "Appoint a dedicated spotter/signalperson to monitor the hazard zone before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Allowing personnel within the swing radius of operating heavy machinery is a critical safety violation under OSHA standards, presenting an immediate threat of severe injury or death. Work must be stopped immediately to establish proper physical barricades and safety controls.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart O",
    "OSHA 1926.600",
    "OSHA 1926.21(b)(2)"
  ]
}
